name: word_art
title: Word Art
description: A 2v2 cooperative-vs-competitive game. Each round a secret word is shown to one artist per team; that artist draws ASCII art and passes it to their teammate, who has up to max_attempts guesses. Getting it right on the first guess scores 1 + first_try_bonus points; getting it right on a later attempt scores 1 point; failing all attempts scores 0. After N rounds the higher score wins. The artist and guesser within each team swap every round.

action.description: Artist phase: a string containing ASCII art of the target word. Guess phase: a string with the guessed word (matched case-insensitively after trimming). May also be a dict with key 'submission' wrapping the string, or null (counts as empty submission).

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of steps in the episode.

actTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for agent actions.

runTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).

num_rounds.description: Number of rounds in the episode. Each round draws one word; both teams play in parallel.

max_attempts.description: Number of guesses the guesser gets per artwork. The round ends for a team once they answer correctly or exhaust all attempts.

first_try_bonus.description: Extra points awarded on top of the base correct-guess point when the guesser nails the word on the first attempt.

max_art_chars.description: Maximum length (in characters) of an artist's ASCII art submission. Longer art is truncated.

enforce_no_word_in_art.description: If true (default), the env detects when the artist's submission contains the target word -- verbatim, reversed, letter-by-letter with any separator (e.g. 'C A T', 'C-A-T', 'C\nA\nT'), or with any other non-alphanumeric padding. The raw art is preserved in history (with a disqualification flag) but the guesser sees a placeholder string instead of the original art. Set to false to disable enforcement (useful for tests or for evaluating models without the constraint).

seed.description: Seed for random word sampling. Set to null for nondeterministic play.

freeForm.description: If true, the core harness allows free-form actions on turns where the action space is not enumerable (artist drawing, guesser typing). Always true for word_art.

savePrompt.description: If disabled, skip logging LLM prompts in the replay file.

saveResponse.description: If disabled, skip logging raw LLM responses in the replay file.

remainingOverageTime.description: Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.

num_rounds.description: Total number of rounds in this episode.

max_attempts.description: Total guesses allowed per artwork (same value all episode; mirrors configuration.max_attempts).

phase.description: Current phase of the round: 'art' (artists drawing) or 'guess' (guessers guessing). Empty string before initialization.

role.description: This agent's role in the current round: 'artist' or 'guesser'.

target_word.description: The word to draw, shown ONLY to the artist for this round. Empty string for guessers.

teammate_art.description: ASCII art from this agent's teammate (the artist), shown ONLY to the guesser in the guess phase. Empty string otherwise.

previous_guesses.description: On a guesser's observation during the guess phase: the list of this team's prior incorrect guesses for the current artwork (so the agent knows what NOT to guess again). Empty list otherwise.

attempts_remaining.description: On a guesser's observation during the guess phase: how many guesses this team has left for the current artwork (between 1 and max_attempts). 0 outside the guess phase.

blue_score.description: Total points scored by team Blue so far.

yellow_score.description: Total points scored by team Yellow so far.

blue_attempts_used.description: How many guesses team Blue has used on the current artwork (0..max_attempts).

yellow_attempts_used.description: How many guesses team Yellow has used on the current artwork (0..max_attempts).

history.description: List of completed rounds, each {word, blue_art, blue_art_disqualified, blue_guesses (list), blue_points, yellow_art, yellow_art_disqualified, yellow_guesses (list), yellow_points}. blue_art / yellow_art are the artist's raw submission (preserved for replay transparency even when the env disqualified it).

reward.description: Cumulative points scored by this agent's team. Each round contributes 0, 1, or 1+first_try_bonus.

observation.teammate_art: <your teammate's drawing was disqualified for containing the target word>
